evidence.supporting_excerpt: Company: Example Consumer Tech Role: Fractional Data & AI Lead Location: Remote We need help with product analytics, customer retention, growth experimentation and practical AI implementation.

hypotheses.statement: Example Consumer Tech may need stronger decision systems around retention, growth, analytics.
hypotheses.rationale: The opportunity explicitly references these problem areas.

dimensions.name: capability_fit
dimensions.explanation: Overlap between evidenced capabilities and opportunity requirements.

dimensions.name: preference_fit
dimensions.explanation: Matched weighted engagement, location, or work-style preferences.

dimensions.name: future_direction_fit
dimensions.explanation: Overlap with the user's stated future direction.

dimensions.name: evidence_quality
dimensions.explanation: Coverage and confidence of source-backed evidence.

recommendation.rationale: The opportunity has strong personal relevance and sufficient evidence.
recommendation.next_action: Review the evidence and personalise the draft before contacting anyone.

outreach.subject: Regarding Fractional Data & AI Lead at Example Consumer Tech
outreach.body: Hi, I reviewed the Fractional Data & AI Lead opportunity at Example Consumer Tech. My background in product analytics, retention, ai is directly relevant to retention. I would be interested in discussing the specific outcomes you need and whether a focused engagement is the right fit.
grounded_claims: Example Consumer Tech may need stronger decision systems around retention, growth, analytics.
claims_to_avoid: Claims about internal company problems not supported by public evidence.
